# ICReturnMetadataError.Code.invalid

**Case**

Item metadata request completed with invalid result.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalid
```

## Error Cases

- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.alreadyFetching**: Item metadata request is being serviced.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.canceled**: Item metadata request has been canceled.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.notAvailable**: Item does not have metadata available.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.alreadyFetching**: Item metadata request is being serviced.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.canceled**: Item metadata request has been canceled.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.notAvailable**: Item does not have metadata available.
